permissions.name: Access Simulator
permissions.description: Grants permission-based access to the Simulator module and its associated data.

permissions.name: Upload Model
permissions.description: Allows authorized users to upload and validate structured simulation models.

permissions.name: Create Version
permissions.description: Creates a new version linked to an existing simulator model.

permissions.name: Edit Own Version
permissions.description: Allows users to modify simulator versions created by themselves.

permissions.name: Edit Other Versions
permissions.description: Allows authorized roles to modify versions created by other users.

permissions.name: Publish Version
permissions.description: Changes the version status to Published and makes it accessible to permitted users.

permissions.name: Access Simulator Playground
permissions.description: Provides a sandbox environment isolated from live data for scenario testing.

permissions.name: Download Report
permissions.description: Exports simulation results into downloadable formats (PDF, CSV, XLS).

permissions.name: View Report
permissions.description: Displays generated simulation results in read-only mode within the system.

permissions.name: Transfer Association to Another User
permissions.description: Reassigns an association from one user to another with proper authorization.

permissions.name: Invite Members
permissions.description: Sends onboarding invitations and assigns the Member role upon acceptance.

permissions.name: Invite Property Managers
permissions.description: Sends onboarding invitations and assigns the Property Manager role.

permissions.name: Invite Managers
permissions.description: Sends onboarding invitations and assigns the Manager role.

permissions.name: Invite Super Admin
permissions.description: Initiates onboarding workflow for assigning Super Admin privileges.

permissions.name: View Invited Managers Status
permissions.description: Displays invitation status (Pending / Accepted / Expired).

permissions.name: Create Company
permissions.description: Creates a new company entity with a unique identifier and default configuration.

permissions.name: Edit Company
permissions.description: Updates company metadata and configuration settings with audit tracking.

permissions.name: Delete Company
permissions.description: Soft-deletes or permanently removes a company based on system-level permissions.

permissions.name: Create Single Association
permissions.description: Creates one association linked to a specific company.

permissions.name: Create Multiple Associations
permissions.description: Performs bulk creation of associations using validated batch input.

permissions.name: Edit Association
permissions.description: Updates association details and configuration settings.

permissions.name: Delete Association
permissions.description: Soft-deletes or removes an association after dependency validation checks.

permissions.name: Add Member Role
permissions.description: Create and assign member roles with specific permissions and access levels.

permissions.name: Edit Member Role
permissions.description: Modify existing member roles and update their permissions and access rights.

permissions.name: Delete Member Role
permissions.description: Remove member roles and revoke associated permissions from the system.

permissions.name: View Member List
permissions.description: Access and view the complete list of members and their role assignments.

permissions.name: Manage Users
permissions.description: Access user management interface to view, edit, and manage user accounts.

permissions.name: Create Role
permissions.description: Create new roles with custom permissions and access configurations.

permissions.name: Edit Role
permissions.description: Modify existing roles and update their permission sets and configurations.

permissions.name: Delete Role
permissions.description: Remove roles from the system and handle associated user reassignments.

permissions.name: Assign Permissions
permissions.description: Grant or revoke specific permissions to roles and manage access control.

permissions.name: Manage CD Plans
permissions.description: Create and manage CD plans, and assign Members with predefined access permissions.

permissions.name: Manage Loan Offers
permissions.description: Create and manage loan offers, and assign Managers with clearly defined access rights.
